label_en: Total registered residents per PLR area at 31 December snapshot
Share of male residents; computed as E_EM / E_E
Share of female residents; computed as E_EW / E_E
Share of residents under 18 years; computed from E_U1+E_1U6+E_6U15+E_15U18 / E_E
Share of residents aged 18 to under 27 years; computed from E_E18_21+E_E21_25+E_E25_27 / E_E
Share of residents aged 27 to under 45 years; computed from E_E27_30+E_E30_35+E_E35_40+E_E40_45 / E_E
Share of residents aged 45 to under 65 years; computed from E_E45_50+E_E50_55+E_E55U65 / E_E
Share of residents aged 65 years and over; computed from E_65U80+E_80U110 / E_E
Mean age in years; midpoint-weighted over standard age cohorts
Share of foreign nationals; computed as E_A / E_E
Share of residents with migration background; computed as MH_E / E_E
caveats: Methodological break ~2017: Mikrozensus definition of Migrationshintergrund changed around 2017. Pre-2017 values are present in the data but are not directly comparable to post-2017 values. Use definition_vintage_from=2017 for time-series analysis.

label_en: Share of residents with 5 or more years of continuous residence at current address; derived from DAU5 column
Share of residents with 10 or more years of continuous residence at current address; derived from DAU10 column
